mapper.sql: id, task_name, task_code, category_id, description, status, current_version_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task (task_name, task_code, category_id, description, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskCode}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task SET task_name = #{taskName}, task_code = #{taskCode}, category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM df_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
